paragraphs.text: This page is ready for the words that should come from Nahuel alone.

Write about the moment life changed when you met her. Tell her which small things make your home feel warm, what you admire about her as Rayden's mother, and which ordinary day you would happily live again.
Include one difficult season you crossed together, one thing she may not realize you notice, and three hopes for the years still ahead. Specific memories will feel more loving than perfect sentences.
Thirty-five years brought you here. I feel impossibly lucky that our paths met—and that I get to keep walking beside you.

dedication: with all my love, today and every day
